answers.where: compact low-poly city block intersection with roads, lane markings, grass lots, car, package mission pad, buildings, streetlights, NPCs and HUD
answers.action: follow the bright yellow mission pad to the alley package, enter the nearby car, or press E near the package
answers.response: pickup changes HUD to deliver, raises WANTED 1, and toy blaster stun feedback appears
answers.reward: cash reward and next job lock after drop-off
answers.game_look: low-poly Roblox-like toy city prototype with car, NPCs, mission pad, road markings, colored buildings and readable HUD

issues.text: The city is still prototype-simple, but no longer blocks first-slice readability.

not_covered.reason: progression is HUD cash plus next-job-lock in this first slice; no separate panel yet
retry text is toast-only; no separate restart screen yet

problem: Pass for first slice: the first action now reads from the world and HUD, with only minor density/polish debt remaining.
next: Expand the playable loop with better vehicle handling or a second street job; keep strict screenshots for each new system.
